NLN Team Coaching

An operating system built for nonprofits.

Leveraging nonprofit language, values, and timeless best practices, the Next Level Nonprofit system helps you serve your clients with the highest level of excellence.

Schedule a Discovery Call Explore the System
How It Works

Designed around the unique complexity of the social sector.

NLN differs from other business operating systems because it uses nonprofit language that reflects nonprofit values and focuses, while incorporating timeless best practice methods from both the for- and nonprofit spheres.

NLN centers the "who" first, while traditional operating systems center the "what" and the "how." NLN believes that the right "whos" lead to the best "hows" and well-executed "whats" for your clients.

Unlike operating systems built for for-profit companies, NLN recognizes that nonprofits serve a broader range of stakeholder types, have access to fewer resources, and can operate in a difficult emotional landscape — all without receiving market value for their products and services. That level of complexity deserves the highest-quality coaching available — designed especially for nonprofits.

The NLN Difference
  • Nonprofit language & valuesBuilt around how nonprofits actually operate — not adapted from a for-profit playbook.
  • The “who” comes firstRight people in right seats drive the best outcomes for your clients.
  • 65% average score improvementOne year of NLN coaching improves Organizational Assessment scores by an average of 65%.

The NLN Values

Three principles guide every engagement.

01

Relentlessly Pursuing Excellence

The clients you serve don't just deserve "good enough". NLN coaching supports organizations to align their teams, gain strategic clarity, and execute with discipline, achieving the highest level of excellence

02

Bold Humility

Asking hard questions and acknowledging gaps requires courage. NLN creates the safety to be candid and the structure to act on what you discover.

03

Building Transformative Relationships

Coaching is not a report or a workshop. It's an ongoing, fulfilling relationship built on trust, competent facilitation, and the coach's genuine investment in your mission.

Ellie's Role

A partner in learning, focus, and reflection.

Coaching works when leaders are candid about their challenges — and when their team commits to doing whatever is necessary to improve internal systems.

As your coach, my role is to partner with you in learning the system, holding your team's focus as you implement, and helping you reflect on and use the learning, progress, hiccups, and the story the data tells along the way.

Annual Membership What’s Included

What’s included with our Next Level Nonprofit Annual Membership?

Access to a Certified NLN Coach

NLN is the only comprehensive organizational operating system designed exclusively for nonprofits. Our Coaches are uniquely trained, developed, and supported by a thriving ecosystem of nonprofit experts — and they’re in your corner all year long.

Launchpad Training

NLN HQ gives you ongoing access to all Launchpad Training materials so your organization never skips a beat:

  • Revisit any session for a refresher
  • Onboard new leadership team members quickly and confidently
  • Roll out NLN tools effectively across every department
Advanced Tools & Frameworks

Go deeper with a growing toolkit of resources purpose-built for nonprofits — designed to sharpen your strategy, strengthen your team, and equip your organization for every stage of growth ahead.

Next Level Software

A custom-built Monday.com template that puts your entire NLN system in one place, making execution simpler and team alignment visible.

The Flight Deck

Our online community of Next Level Leaders & Coaches for:

  • Peer-to-Peer Q&A
  • Resource Sharing
  • Topical Conversations
Lambot — Your AI Coach

On-demand, high-level guidance grounded in the NLN operating system — available anytime, anywhere — so you always have support when you need it most.
